posts.text: Seventeen thriving private prison industry lobbyists on their way straight to Hell. Reporting by me: migrantinsider.com/p/meet-th…

Democrats want to fund TSA. Republicans want to pretend like masked ICE agents make us safer.


Andrew Lamparski (@andrewlamparski)

Heated confrontation between Sen. John Cornyn and Rep. Greg Casar outside of the Austin airport just now. The two are split on a DHS funding shutdown that’s left some federal employees without paychecks for a month now.

@cbsaustin

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/andrewlamparski/status/2033595085573501388#m

Vermont is the next Minneapolis.


Jesus Freakin Congress (@TheJFreakinC)

🚨BREAKING: ICE agents knocked down the door of a family home looking for a man who wasn’t inside… then illegally took the people from the house.

This happened in South Burlington, Vermont, where agents say a man fled from them earlier in a car, and ran into a nearby house. 

They then surrounded the home, and flooded the neighborhood with federal agents, while hundreds of activists gathered outside trying to stop the ill
Haitian woman, 31, dies alone at Pittsburgh bus stop days after ICE released her to the streets far from home to perish. Rest in power, Daphy Michel: migrantinsider.com/p/the-lon…

Nashville Noticias reporter Estefany Rodríguez covered ICE abductions for years. Now she's abducted by ICE — and the warrant that put her there may not hold up in federal court. My update on Estef's case: migrantinsider.com/p/the-report...

ACLU MN reported yesterday that the federal government filed sworn statements that there are 970 agents in Minnesota for Operation Metro Surge & that 407 agents will remain here in March.  It’s important to note this is on top of the 190 agents that were already assigned before this surge started.
ICE is stealing from the people they detain whether they are U.S. citizens, have legal status, or are undocumented... watches, jewelry, phones, money or anything they feel is of value.

“To get the general strike, that means that we have to learn how to participate in local solidarity, too. If we can't manage local solidarity, we can’t scale it up.”

Congresswoman Summer L. Lee talks building for a General Strike

ICMYI, dozens of House and Senate aides traded the Capitol warmth for Upper Senate Park cold yesterday, holding a somber vigil to demand an end to the murder of Americans by federal agents. migrantinsider.com/p/staffers-w...
Meet the Lobbyists Behind Migrant Detention (by Pablo Manríquez). Seventeen thriving private prison industry lobbyists on their way straight to Hell.

SCOOP: Court Restores 30-Day Appeal Window for Migrants  (by Ale Franqueza). Migrants win by knockout in Amica Center v EOIR case. Policy Memorandum 26-02 is DOJ's quiet admission that parts of the immigration court system were already operating outside the law.
The Lonesome Death of Daphy Michel (by Pablo Manríquez). Watch now | Haitian Woman, 31, Dies Alone at Pittsburgh Bus Stop Days After ICE Released Her Far From Home to Die.
KATIE BRITT ATTACKS MIGRANT INSIDER (by Pablo Manríquez)

Trump’s Immigration Approval Craters as Americans Blame Republicans For DHS Shutdown  (by Pablo Manríquez). Independent voters who trust neither party on immigration hate ICE at 79 percent — and they're waiting for someone to make the case to them.

The Reporter ICE Doesn't Want Reporting (by Pablo Manríquez). Watch now | Nashville Noticias journalist Estefany Rodríguez covered ICE detentions for years. Now she's in one — and the warrant that put her there may not hold up in federal court.

DePaul Bets on Journalism Education as a Weapon Against ICE (by Pablo Manríquez). A new institute built for community storytellers launches alongside a platform documenting federal abuses — and neither is backing down.

EXCLUSIVE: Markwayne Mullin on Mass Deportations (by Pablo Manríquez). Trump's nominee for Homeland Security secretary's maverick, plainspoken style could diverge in key ways with the xenophobic hellscape championed by Stephen Miller in the White House.
ICE Abducts Nashville Reporter Estefany Rodríguez (by Pablo Manríquez). Watch now | She was in a marked press car. They took her anyway.

Inside the Rising Grassroots Resistance to Trump's Anti-Migrant Regime (by Logan Johnson). Across red states and blue cities, ordinary people are throwing themselves before the gears of Trump's deportation agenda.
Trump Finally Fires Kristi Noem (by Pablo Manríquez). Sen. Markwayne Mullin is expected to replace the disgraced DHS secretary.
WATCH: GOP Senators Cook Kristi Noem (by Pablo Manríquez)

Kristi Noem Fails Performance Review in Senate (by Pablo Manríquez). Two Republican senators didn't just ask tough questions Tuesday — they delivered a verdict: Kristi Noem is a failure as DHS secretary.

Catholic Bishops File Supreme Court Brief Calling Trump's Birthright Citizenship Order "Immoral" (by Pablo Manríquez). The nation’s Catholic bishops are urging the nation’s highest court to strike down Executive Order 14,160 on constitutional and moral grounds.

Palestinian Refugee Sues Far-Right Group Betar Over Year-Long Campaign of Racial Terror (by Pablo Manríquez). Lawsuit invokes Reconstruction-era anti-KKK law as Trump administration deports activists from Betar Zionist Organization’s own list.

CAPITOL HILL — Rep. Dan Goldman (D-NY) on his new bill with Rep. Delia Ramirez and Sen. Catherine Cortes Masto to claw back the exorbitant fees the Trump admin now charges unaccompanied migrant CHILDREN to apply for status in the U.S.
Rep. Brad Johnson reacts to how Speaker Mike Johnson refusing to have Adelita Grijalva sworn in
Icymi, @migrantinsider asked Speaker Mike Johnson about the Bad Bunny Super Bowl. It got awkward.
Rep. Mark Takano, a California Democrat, told me last week that immigration in court is unsafe for immigrants.
Is it safe for migrants to attend their immigration court appearances? AOC responds.
Rep. Yassamin Ansari, an Arizona Democrat, on Republicans and Trump refusing to releaser the Epstein files
Marjorie Taylor Greene is concerned about Migrant Insider.
Rep. Delia Ramirez (D-IL) tells me DHS secretary Kristi Noem will eventually be prosecuted for her crimes in office #ICEraids #deliaramirez #houseofrepresentatives
Asked Alexandria Ocasio Cortez her message to Internet sleuths working overtime to unmask ICE agents terrorizing communities. Here's what she said.
